rows.label: qev015001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Um... you're [ST:playername ]-san, right! I'm
Dirk, from Avalanche. I'm here
on a mission in this area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Just the other day, everyone was talking about
how an amazing rookie joined Elma's team... I
really wanted to talk to you at least once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0003
rows.name:
You've been destroying formidable Growth enemies one
after another, so I figure you must always devise amazing
strategies to toy with the attacking enemies, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0011
rows.name:
State that you defeat them by
utilizing various strategies.

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0021
rows.name:
Boast that you crush them
with a head-on clash.

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heh... so that kind of method exists...
I'm a sniper type, so your story is
very helpful as reference.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0005
rows.name:
Defeating the people on this planet who don't
go down easily in such a manner... I wonder how
much power is needed to make that possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0006
rows.name:
...That's right! Do you happen to
have some free time right now, [ST:playername ]-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0007
rows.name:
You see, our team "Jaeger" came all the
way to Shiraki no Tairiku on a mission to
gather materials from native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0008
rows.name:
So, if it's alright with you, I was
hoping we could fight together...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0009
rows.name:
Is it no good? I... really
want to see how you fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Phew—I'm glad! Since it's our first
time here I was feeling uneasy, but
with you around I feel secure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Um... Adelbert-san, it's fine,
right? We have a lot of materials
to gather this time, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0012
rows.name: ...Of course it is. You're a big help, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0014
rows.name:
Not only are there native creatures
in this area, but those Growth
bastards are wandering around too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0015
rows.name:
I was thinking it'd be a bit
tough doing this job while
babysitting this greenhorn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0016
rows.name:
That's mean... I've experienced
my fair share of battles too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0017
rows.name:
In this hunt, I'll show
Fine-san and Grette-san that
I've broken out of my shell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0030
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0031
rows.name: Express concern for Dirk.

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0040
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0041
rows.name: Cheer Dirk on.

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0018
rows.name: No way, even you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0019
rows.name:
...It's fine, I'll bag an amazing prey
and change the way everyone looks at me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thank you very much! I will
definitely bag an amazing prey![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'm expecting great things,
greenhorn! Well then, shall we
head out for the hunt right away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Fine! Grette! I have
a small favor to ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0023
rows.name:
We'll go hunt enemies in the vicinity,
so I want you two to gather information
on the target materials at the base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Giving orders to me? And forcing
such a plain job on us, no less...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Now, now! Backup is an important job too,
right? Let's finish it up quickly, and just
the two of us can eat that cold cake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0026
rows.name:
I suppose you're right...
Understood. I'll forgive him
this time for your sake, Fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Thanks, Fine. Alright, we'll
defeat the Intara Unicor in this
area and secure its safety.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0028
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! It's a competition to see who
can hunt faster! Let me test out
that rumored strength of yours![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0050
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0051
rows.name:
Accept the challenge, saying
it's exactly what you wanted.

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0060
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0061
rows.name:
Admonish Adelbert, saying
this isn't a game.

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0029
rows.name: I don't dislike manly folks like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0030
rows.name:
...Heh! My arms are itching for
action! Let the hunt begin at once![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0031
rows.name: Guh... You make a fair point, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Haha! Adelbert-san, who's
always pulling us along, seems
somewhat like a kid today![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0033
rows.name:
Dirk! I'll remember this later!
Anyway, we're starting the hunt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0034
rows.name:
Everyone! Just don't neglect your caution!
Aside from us, there are no humans here. It
wouldn't be strange no matter what happens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Fine-san and Grette-san are
gathering information about
the area inside the tent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0036
rows.name:
Let's hurry up and defeat the Intara
Unicor to secure the safety of our base![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0039
rows.name:
...Huh? Didn't you feel a strange
presence just now? Hmm... Maybe
it's just my imagination.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0071
rows.name:
Reassure him that it's
just his imagination.

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0081
rows.name:
Prompt caution, saying you
definitely felt a presence.

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0040
rows.name:
Is that so... Well... if you
say so, it must be fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0041
rows.name:
Haha, since it's a hunt in
unfamiliar territory, I might
just be a little overly sensitive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0042
rows.name:
It was different from the bloodlust
of a native creature... It was
something far more terrifying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0043
rows.name:
I wonder what it was... But... it's
probably best to stay vigilant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0044
rows.name:
Adelbert-san...! Ah, ugh...
What should I... Uuuuuuh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0045
rows.name:
Ah... It's you!! I'm sorry! What am I
supposed to do!? Ugh... at this rate,
everyone will be taken by them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0090
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask for an explanation of the situation.

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0100
rows.name: Calm down

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0101
rows.name: Calm down the panicked Dirk first.

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0046
rows.name: D-Details... right... ...Yes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0047
rows.name:
Calm down? Yes, I'll calm
down... and explain...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Adelbert-san returned, and
we were having dinner here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0049
rows.name:
Then, a large group of those aliens
called Bias showed up... uugh...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0050
rows.name: ...They showed up... and then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0051
rows.name:
Adelbert-san was killed...!
He tried to protect Grette-san
and lunged at them...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0052
rows.name:
Ugh... and then those guys... stuffed
the two of them into sacks as they
resisted, and took them away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0053
rows.name: Please... Please, save those two...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0054
rows.name:
Those guys headed northwest... There's
a cave there suitable for a hideout,
so they're probably there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0055
rows.name:
I am... the absolute worst... I hid inside
the tent, watching Adelbert-san get killed,
and those two get taken away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0056
rows.name:
I just watched the whole time, without doing
anything... Faced with their overwhelming
power, I was just trembling... aah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0057
rows.name: ...Please. Please, save those two...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0058
rows.name:
Those guys headed northwest... There's
a cave there suitable for a hideout,
so they're probably there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0059
rows.name:
...Welcome back, [ST:playername ]-san. I heard
everything from Fine-san...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0060
rows.name:
About Grette-san... I still haven't
been able to fully accept it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0061
rows.name:
Just having Fine-san alive
is practically a miracle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0062
rows.name:
Thank you so much. It's all
thanks to you being there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0110
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask where Fine is.

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0120
rows.name: Apologize

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0121
rows.name:
Apologize for not being
able to save Grette.

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0063
rows.name:
Right now, she cut off the
feedback to her nerve circuits
and is sleeping inside the tent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0064
rows.name:
Even a small noise made her
terrified and sobbing, screaming
that the Bias were coming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0065
rows.name:
She was severely confused... But,
I suppose it can't be helped...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0066
rows.name:
After all, Fine-san witnessed
Grette-san's... right there on the spot...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0067
rows.name:
She cried herself to sleep and is resting in the
tent now, but... Until just a moment ago, Fine-san
was apologizing endlessly to Grette-san...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0068
rows.name:
Even though the one who should
be apologizing is me, who was
too scared to do anything...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0070
rows.name:
...I'm thinking of returning
to NLA with Fine-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0071
rows.name:
And then, I'll stay by her side and support
her until she recovers her spirit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0072
rows.name:
No matter how long it takes, even if she
tells me I'm a nuisance, I won't leave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0073
rows.name:
For a powerless guy like me who couldn't
save Adelbert-san and Grette-san, this is
the only way I can atone for my sins...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0130
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0131
rows.name:
Nod, saying that the deceased
would want that too.

rows.label: qev015001_JNK0140
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev015001_SEL0141
rows.name:
Persuade him that it's wrong to
use her as a tool for atonement.

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0074
rows.name:
You're almost like a clergyman. I too
wish to continue supporting Fine-san
with deep affection like yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0075
rows.name:
You're almost like a teacher. It is strange to
call it atonement, isn't it. I will show you
that I can support her with a sincere heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0076
rows.name:
We might not be able to do BLADE
missions anymore... but we'll be
cheering for your success.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015001_MSG0077
rows.name:
Please accept the reward. On our
behalf... Please continue saving
many people from here on out.[ST:wait ]
